nodes.label: Value
nodes.description: Global multiplier (default 1.0) applied to all slider values

nodes.label: NumClones
nodes.description: Number of active clones to address

nodes.label: SliderPack
nodes.description: Slider pack providing per-clone values at each index

nodes.label: Multiply
nodes.description: For each clone i: sliderData[i] * Value

nodes.label: Per-Clone Output
nodes.description: Each clone receives its slider value times the global multiplier (normalised)
